title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.710 - Missouri-bred horses, program to encourage
text:
313.710.  Missouri-bred horses, program to encourage. — A program to encourage and award the owners and breeders of Missouri-bred horses that win horse races in this state may be established by rules and regulations promulgated by the commission.
(L. 1986 S.B. 572) 
Effective 5-06-86
